Simple by Design

How It Works

01
🎒

Attach to Your Bag

Velcro straps secure ParPack to virtually any golf bag in under 10 seconds. Quick attach, quick release — zero fuss.

02
📦

Stay Organized

Main compartment, insulated snack pocket, and small-item pockets keep everything in its place throughout your round.

03
🚗

Detach & Take It With You

When the round ends, detach ParPack and wear it into the clubhouse or straight to your car. No extra bags, no scrambling.

What's Inside

Built for Golfers.
Ready for Real Life.

⚡

Attaches in Seconds

Velcro straps are adjustable to fit any golf bag. No tools, no extra hardware — just clip and go.

🧊

Insulated Snack Pocket

Keep your drinks cold and snacks fresh all 18 holes. The insulated bottom pocket is a game-changer.

🪶

Lightweight & Durable

Designed to add zero fatigue to your round. Water-resistant fabric handles the elements on and off the course.

📱

Built for Overpackers

If you're always bringing too much to the course, ParPack gives you the space to do it without the chaos.

🔄

Attaches & Detaches

Clips onto your bag at the course, detaches when you're done. Built specifically for golfers, not repurposed from something else.

🏌️

Made for High School & College Golfers

Designed around how young competitive golfers actually play — tournaments, practice rounds, and everything in between.

Golfers are always scrambling — digging for their phone, hunting for snacks, stashing gear they can't reach. ParPack is the upgrade your bag deserves.

The Founder

Golfer & Problem Solver

Our Story
ParPack was born from being an overpacker — and never having enough accessible storage during rounds.

Instead of designing another golf bag — there are thousands of those — the idea was simpler: add something better to the bag you already love.

ParPack is built for high school and college golfers who are tired of scrambling on the course. The ones who bring too much, can't find anything, and want their gear within reach without wrestling with a cluttered bag. Whether you're competing in a tournament or grinding at the range, the scramble is real — and ParPack ends it.
